creatives.niche_raw: retro gaming enthusiasts, collectors of original game cartridges, audiophile-level gamers who demand authentic hardware, FPGA hobbyists
creatives.angle_raw: authentic tribute to portable gaming history — real hardware, not emulation; the scholarly definitive version for those who demand no compromises

problem_um_raw: Completely engineered in *two FPGAs. No emulation.

claims: The most advanced display in handheld gaming.

mechanism: compatible with the 2,780+ Game Boy, Game Boy Color & Game Boy Advance game cartridge library
cartridge adapters for Game Gear, Neo Geo Pocket Color, TurboGrafx-16, Atari Lynx

notes: Analogue Pocket leads with hardware authenticity ('No emulation') as its primary structural bet — positioned against emulation as inferior. The anti-emulation frame is the explicit problem-UM: emulation is a compromise, FPGA is authentic. Secondary pitch: advanced display and scholarly preservation mission ('openFPGA'). Price: $239.99. Currently in stock (Ships June 2026 stated on page).
